steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content:
Left side: To collect such data by means of social media does raise a serious ethical concern — independent clause
Right side: Material introduced by though forms a dependent clause followed by an independent clause

steps.title: Apply the rule and select the answer
steps.content:
A colon introduces an elaboration or explanation of an independent clause.

The though clause elaborates on the concern by contrasting what terms of service allow with what users are told; a colon before though correctly marks this elaboration.

Options A (semicolon after though) and B (colon after though) misposition punctuation, and Option C lacks the punctuation needed to signal the elaborative relationship.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
